title: Only In Your Dreams
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Only_In_Your_Dreams.jpg|thumb|250px]]
'''''Only In Your Dreams''''' was an [[album]] by [[Starburst]]. It was given a Scarlet rating by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Track listing==
*"[[After the Old Life]]"
*"[[Cold Dawn]]"
*"[[Death or Glory]]"
*"[[Diamonds (song)|Diamonds]]"
*"[[End of the Line]]"
*"[[Liberty Road]]"
*"[[Life in the Big City]]"
*"[[Only In Your Dreams (song)|Only In Your Dreams]]"
